message:
🐛 Security hardening: sanitize error messages, remove console.log (#1954)

- Replace internal error messages in HTTP/WebSocket responses with generic messages
  across all Go handlers (server.go, kagenti.go, mcp.go, console_persistence.go,
  workloads.go, mcs.go, gateway.go, gitops.go, rbac.go, namespaces.go, nightly_e2e.go,
  notifications.go, settings.go, sse.go, benchmarks.go, missions.go)
- Log actual error details server-side with log.Printf for debugging
- Remove console.log statements from production hook code (useLLMd.ts, useRewards.tsx)
- All target="_blank" links already have rel="noopener noreferrer" (verified)

Partial fix for #1911. Deferred items:
- CSP unsafe-inline/unsafe-eval (complex, risk of breaking app)
- Rate limiting (requires middleware infrastructure)
- CORS wildcard, JWT secret, DOMPurify (needs careful security review)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
